scripts.build: ng build && mkdir -p ../angular-app/browser/registration ../angular-app/browser/registration-2 ../angular-app/browser/registration-3 ../angular-app/browser/profile && cp ../angular-app/browser/index.html ../angular-app/browser/registration/index.html && cp ../angular-app/browser/index.html ../angular-app/browser/registration-2/index.html && cp ../angular-app/browser/index.html ../angular-app/browser/registration-3/index.html && cp ../angular-app/browser/index.html ../angular-app/browser/profile/index.html
scripts.build:pages: ng build --configuration production --base-href /angular-app/ --output-path ../site/angular-app && mkdir -p ../site/angular-app/browser/registration ../site/angular-app/browser/registration-2 ../site/angular-app/browser/registration-3 ../site/angular-app/browser/profile && cp ../site/angular-app/browser/index.html ../site/angular-app/browser/registration/index.html && cp ../site/angular-app/browser/index.html ../site/angular-app/browser/registration-2/index.html && cp ../site/angular-app/browser/index.html ../site/angular-app/browser/registration-3/index.html && cp ../site/angular-app/browser/index.html ../site/angular-app/browser/profile/index.html
